title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password that is at least 8 characters long (e.g., Password123)
Confirm the password
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard
New account is stored in the database with the provided email and password

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter the email address that already exists (e.g., existing@example.com)
Enter a valid password meeting minimum length requirements
Confirm the password
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with password shorter than 8 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address
Enter a password that is less than 8 characters (e.g., Pass12)
Confirm the password
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No new account is created in the database

title: Email uniqueness validation before account creation
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter the email address that already exists (e.g., existing@example.com)
Enter a valid password meeting minimum length requirements
Confirm the password
Observe the system behavior before clicking submit (if client-side validation exists) OR click submit and observe the response
expected_results: The system checks for email uniqueness before proceeding with account creation
If client-side validation: an error is shown immediately after entering the email or before form submission
If server-side validation: an error message is displayed after form submission indicating the email is already taken
No duplicate account is created in the database

title: Password length validation at exactly 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address
Enter a password that is exactly 8 characters long (e.g., Pass1234)
Confirm the password
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard
New account is stored in the database with the provided email and password

title: Password length validation at 7 characters (just below minimum)
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address
Enter a password that is exactly 7 characters long (e.g., Pass123)
Confirm the password
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No new account is created in the database
